title: Monday.listen('events') does not respond to changes on Sub items
excerpt:
Hi Team, 
I just realized that the monday.listen(‘event’) does not respond to changes in sub items. 
Ideally, I would expect to behave the same way for items or sub-items. 
Is this a bug or a known issue?

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

I just realized that the monday.listen(‘event’) does not respond to changes in sub items.

Ideally, I would expect to behave the same way for items or sub-items.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kranthi_thoughtflow,

Would you be able to please fill this form adding the script you are using and the type of feature your app has so that our team can take a look into it?

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: asplundsoftware (Brad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday What’s the resolution here? is there some prescribed way that we should be listening for updates to subitems since I agree, they don’t trigger updates within the normal context of a board view (presumably because they are a different board ID than the main items)

Thanks!
